case_title: MICHAEL FELL VS. ALEX ROZKIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,175.00 FILED BY FELL, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT ROZKIN, ALEX BARKOUSKI, VITALI USA WORLD BUSINESS SERVICE INC. (ELENA ROZKIN, AGENT)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE COLLECTRIX, LLC. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT FELL, MICHAEL NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,175.00 FILED BY FELL, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT ROZKIN, ALEX BARKOUSKI, VITALI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-06-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BARKOUSKI, VITALI

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE AMENDED CLAIM TO JUL-29-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "PLAINTIFF INTENDS TO ADD ANOTHER DEFENDANT", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MUST SERVE ALL THE DEFENDANTS PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (6 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF FELL, MICHAEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-29-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (3) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT US WORLD BUSINESS ETC. WAS REPRESENTED BY VITALI BARKOUSKI--MANAGER. ALL THREE DEFENDANTS WAIVE UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS ON THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FELL, MICHAEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ROZKIN, ALEX BARKOUSKI, VITALI USA WORLD BUSINESS SERVICE INC. (ELENA ROZKIN, AGENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
